inputs.label: Calibration Factor
inputs.businessContext: A multiplier to adjust the calculated size (e.g., for different temperature or manufacturing tolerance).

businessContext_i18n.en: A multiplier to adjust the calculated size (e.g., for different temperature or manufacturing tolerance).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hesaplanan boyutu ayarlamak için çarpan (örneğin, farklı sıcaklık veya üretim toleransı için).
businessContext_i18n.de: Ein Multiplikator zur Anpassung der berechneten Größe (z. B. für unterschiedliche Temperatur oder Fertigungstoleranz).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Un multiplicateur pour ajuster la taille calculée (par exemple, pour différentes températures ou tolérances de fabrication).
businessContext_i18n.es: Un multiplicador para ajustar el tamaño calculado (p. ej., para diferentes temperaturas o tolerancias de fabricación).
businessContext_i18n.ar: مُضاعِف لضبط الحجم المحسوب (مثلًا لدرجات حرارة مختلفة أو تفاوتات تصنيع).

formulas.diameter_inches_used: diameter_inches > 0 ? diameter_inches : (circumference_inches > 0 ? circumference_inches / Math.PI : (diameter_mm > 0 ? diameter_mm / 25.4 : (circumference_mm > 0 ? (circumference_mm / 25.4) / Math.PI : 0)))

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
